media.c(3) Library Functions Manual media.c(3)

NAME

media.c - Media file and stream options.

SYNOPSIS

Macros


#define RENDER_FILE_MODES (OPTION_MODE_CLIENT | OPTION_MODE_MIRROR | OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY)

Variables


const registry_entry_t g_media_entries []

Detailed Description

Media file and stream options.

Options for streaming from media files, URLs, seeking, looping, and cookie handling for streaming services.

Author

Zachary Fogg me@zfo.gg

Date

January 2026

Definition in file media.c.

Macro Definition Documentation

#define RENDER_FILE_MODES (OPTION_MODE_CLIENT | OPTION_MODE_MIRROR | OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY)

Variable Documentation

const registry_entry_t g_media_entries[]

Definition at line 39 of file media.c.

39                                          {
40     // Media File Streaming Options
41     {"file",
42      'f',
43      OPTION_TYPE_STRING,
44      offsetof(options_t, media_file),
45      "",
46      0,
47      "Stream from media file or stdin (use '-' for stdin). Supported formats: see man ffmpeg-formats; codecs: see man "
48      "ffmpeg-codecs.",
49      "MEDIA",
50      NULL,
51      false,
52      "ASCII_CHAT_FILE",
53      NULL,
54      NULL,
55      false,
56      false,
57      OPTION_MODE_CLIENT | OPTION_MODE_MIRROR | OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY,
58      {0},
59      NULL},
60     {"url",
61      'u',
62      OPTION_TYPE_STRING,
63      offsetof(options_t, media_url),
64      "",
65      0,
66      "Stream from network URL. Direct HTTP/HTTPS/RTSP streams use FFmpeg; complex sites (YouTube, TikTok, etc.) use "
67      "yt-dlp. Supported formats: see man ffmpeg-formats; codecs: see man ffmpeg-codecs; sites: yt-dlp "
68      "https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp/blob/master/README.md#supported-sites.",
69      "MEDIA",
70      NULL,
71      false,
72      "ASCII_CHAT_URL",
73      NULL,
74      NULL,
75      false,
76      false,
77      OPTION_MODE_CLIENT | OPTION_MODE_MIRROR | OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY,
78      {0},
79      NULL},
80     {"loop",
81      'l',
82      OPTION_TYPE_BOOL,
83      offsetof(options_t, media_loop),
84      &default_media_loop_value,
85      sizeof(bool),
86      "Loop media file playback (not supported for --url).",
87      "MEDIA",
88      NULL,
89      false,
90      "ASCII_CHAT_LOOP",
91      NULL,
92      NULL,
93      false,
94      false,
95      OPTION_MODE_CLIENT | OPTION_MODE_MIRROR | OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY,
96      {0},
97      NULL},
98     {"pause",
99      '\0',
100      OPTION_TYPE_BOOL,
101      offsetof(options_t, pause),
102      &default_pause_value,
103      sizeof(bool),
104      "Start playback paused (toggle with spacebar, requires --file or --url).",
105      "MEDIA",
106      NULL,
107      false,
108      "ASCII_CHAT_PAUSE",
109      NULL,
110      NULL,
111      false,
112      false,
113      OPTION_MODE_CLIENT | OPTION_MODE_MIRROR | OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY,
114      {0},
115      NULL},
116     {"seek",
117      's',
118      OPTION_TYPE_CALLBACK,
119      offsetof(options_t, media_seek_timestamp),
120      &default_media_seek_value,
121      sizeof(double),
122      "Seek to timestamp before playback (format: seconds, MM:SS, or HH:MM:SS.ms).",
123      "MEDIA",
124      NULL,
125      false,
126      "ASCII_CHAT_SEEK",
127      NULL,
128      parse_timestamp,
129      false,
130      false,
131      OPTION_MODE_CLIENT | OPTION_MODE_MIRROR | OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY,
132      {.examples = g_seek_examples, .input_type = OPTION_INPUT_STRING},
133      NULL},
134     {"yt-dlp-options",
135      '\0',
136      OPTION_TYPE_STRING,
137      offsetof(options_t, yt_dlp_options),
138      NULL,
139      sizeof(((options_t *)0)->yt_dlp_options),
140      "Arbitrary yt-dlp options passed to the extraction subprocess for URL resolution. "
141      "Examples: --no-warnings or --proxy socks5://127.0.0.1:1080 or --cookies-from-browser=firefox.",
142      "MEDIA",
143      NULL,
144      false,
145      "ASCII_CHAT_YT_DLP_OPTIONS",
146      NULL,
147      NULL,
148      false,
149      false,
150      OPTION_MODE_CLIENT | OPTION_MODE_MIRROR | OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY,
151      {0},
152      NULL},
153     {"video-codec",
154      '\0',
155      OPTION_TYPE_STRING,
156      offsetof(options_t, video_codec),
157      "hevc",
158      sizeof(((options_t *)0)->video_codec),
159      "Video codec for streaming (raw, hevc). raw=uncompressed RGB, hevc=H.265 compression. Default: hevc.",
160      "MEDIA",
161      "CODEC",
162      false,
163      "ASCII_CHAT_VIDEO_CODEC",
164      NULL,
165      NULL,
166      false,
167      false,
168      OPTION_MODE_CLIENT | OPTION_MODE_MIRROR,
169      {0},
170      NULL},
171 
172 #ifndef _WIN32
173 #define RENDER_FILE_MODES (OPTION_MODE_CLIENT | OPTION_MODE_MIRROR | OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY)
174 
175     {"render-file",
176      '\0',
177      OPTION_TYPE_STRING,
178      offsetof(options_t, render_file),
179      "",
180      sizeof(((options_t *)0)->render_file),
181      "Render ASCII frames to stdout or video/image file. Use '-' for stdout; extension determines format: "
182      ".mp4, .mov, .webm, .avi, .gif, .png, .jpg  (macOS and Linux only).",
183      "MEDIA",
184      "PATH",
185      false,
186      "ASCII_CHAT_RENDER_FILE",
187      NULL,
188      NULL,
189      false,
190      false,
191      RENDER_FILE_MODES,
192      {0},
193      NULL},
194 
195     {"render-theme",
196      '\0',
197      OPTION_TYPE_CALLBACK,
198      offsetof(options_t, render_theme),
199      &default_render_theme_value,
200      sizeof(int),
201      "Terminal color scheme for rendered output: dark, light, auto.  (macOS and Linux only).",
202      "MEDIA",
203      "THEME",
204      false,
205      "ASCII_CHAT_RENDER_THEME",
206      NULL,
207      parse_render_theme,
208      false,
209      false,
210      RENDER_FILE_MODES,
211      {.enum_values = g_render_theme_values,
212       .enum_descriptions = g_render_theme_descs,
213       .input_type = OPTION_INPUT_ENUM},
214      NULL},
215 
216     {"render-font",
217      '\0',
218      OPTION_TYPE_STRING,
219      offsetof(options_t, render_font),
220      "",
221      sizeof(((options_t *)0)->render_font),
222      "Font for render-file output: bundled names (matrix or default), system font names, or absolute .ttf/.otf path. "
223      "Default: matrix (Matrix Resurrected font). Falls back to default (DejaVu Sans Mono) if unavailable. "
224      "Examples: matrix, default, JetBrains Mono, Nerd Font Mono, /path/to/font.ttf. "
225      "(macOS and Linux only).",
226      "MEDIA",
227      "FONT",
228      false,
229      "ASCII_CHAT_RENDER_FONT",
230      NULL,
231      NULL,
232      false,
233      false,
234      RENDER_FILE_MODES,
235      {0},
236      NULL},
237 
238     {"render-font-size",
239      '\0',
240      OPTION_TYPE_DOUBLE,
241      offsetof(options_t, render_font_size),
242      &default_render_font_size_value,
243      sizeof(double),
244      "Font size in points for render-file output (default: 12.0, must be > 0, fractional sizes supported e.g. 10.5).  "
245      "(macOS and Linux only).",
246      "MEDIA",
247      "SIZE",
248      false,
249      "ASCII_CHAT_RENDER_FONT_SIZE",
250      validate_render_font_size,
251      NULL,
252      false,
253      false,
254      RENDER_FILE_MODES,
255      {.input_type = OPTION_INPUT_NUMERIC},
256      NULL},
257 
258 #endif  // !_WIN32
259 
260     REGISTRY_TERMINATOR()};
